race.comment: FEARN TRICK (11) with a pull in the weights gets the nod. Scored first-up at Scone then raced on the pace throughout and wouldn't lie down over 1550m at Canterbury last time, eventually beaten under a length. Will go around at generous odds and is worth a throw at the stumps. LITTLE IRIS (6) tried hard but couldn't quite match a smart one in Decorum over 1400m at Warwick Farm three weeks ago. Bred to want a bit more ground and at just her third race start appeals as a filly with tremendous upside. SOVERATO (7) came with a well-timed run to easily get the cash first-up over 1550m at Canterbury recently. Like McDonald getting on - big chance to go back-to-back. SAMARELLE (3) was a shade disappointing first-up at Warwick Farm but the SP that day tells us she has more to offer. AISLE TWO (4) is flying this prep and cannot be left out of calculations.
